description: RULE 00 enacted: No file deletions without explicit human authorization. Closes refactor-as-deletion loophole.

title: Chrome DevTools MCP connection drops with EOF on macOS
root_cause: Two macOS Chrome bugs: (1) Session restore merges new instances into existing process, dropping --remote-debugging-port flag. (2) Chrome 147+ enforces strict WebSocket origin security, rejecting MCP server connections without --remote-allow-origins=*.
fix: Launch Chrome with isolated profile: --user-data-dir=/tmp/chrome-debug-profile --remote-allow-origins=* --remote-debugging-port=9222. Script: scripts/start-chrome-mcp.sh
